notes: Light Armor shape variants. 46 blocks — every shape exists in two grid sizes (small-grid 0.5 m / 1.25 m / 0.25 m, and large-grid 2.5 m). All share the same profile: PCU 1, built from Steel Plate only, unlocked by default. Mass, health, and steel-plate quantity scale with size class and shape volume. The 'Half Corner' shape is the sole exception on the small-grid side, sitting at 0.25 m / 1.25 m instead of 0.5 m / 2.5 m. Heavy armor variants live in blocks/armor-heavy.json. `armorShape` captures the geometric shape family so mod consumers can match light↔heavy variants across tiers.

resources.displayName: Light Armor Corner 0.5 m
resources.description: Basic armor shape that gives structure and form to grids. Much less durable than heavy armor but also much lighter.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
